displayTitle: Own the Physics, Not Just the Steps
kicker: PT LEVEL II // BASIC PRINCIPLES REVIEW

beats.narration: Level One ran the procedure. Level Two answers for it — setting up, interpreting, and defending every indication from the physics underneath.

payload.title: OWN THE PHYSICS
payload.sub: Level II: the whole method in one frame.
payload.panelLabel: PT // THE FLAW YOU ANSWER FOR

beats.narration: Strip away the hardware: PT is two capillary events. Surface tension pulls penetrant into any clean, open flaw, and the tighter the gap, the harder it pulls.

payload.heading: Two capillary events, one force
payload.note: IN DURING DWELL → DEVELOPER REVERSES IT → OUT AS A WIDE INDICATION

beats.narration: Know which property does which job. Wetting decides if penetrant enters. Viscosity only sets how fast. Volatility must stay low so it never dries inside.
There is no penetrability meter. AMS 2644 grades sensitivity on cracked specimens; daily, you defend the running line against a known-defect panel.

payload.heading: Measuring penetrability and proving it daily

chips.s: PSM or TAM through the line

chips.t: Qualified and used as a family

beats.narration: Contrast is what your eye banks on. Fluorescent emits its own light in the dark; visible reflects red on white — the rest is lighting discipline.

payload.sub: Entry, process control, readout — the physics a Level II signs for.
